productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Red Hip Hop Shoes
description: A stylish shoe for casual outings, the puma Hip Hop is replete with features to enhance your style and help you walk with ease. Designed in a low-profile manner, it is created keeping the foot anatomy in mind to make your walks all the more stable and comfortable. Team this with jeans and tees for those casual days. Upper Canvas upper with contrast coloured overlays on the sides for durability and midfoot support Synthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefoot Canvas stylish side strips in contrast colour Added overlay at the backfoot for durability and support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Comfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable fit Textile lining for added comfort Outsole Made of high traction gum rubber Rubber toe guard strip with tonal sidewall tip Textured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum grip Reinforced heel with brand logo on the collar Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
